description_long: This is a distorted representation of an adult pedestrian, featuring exaggeratedly elongated arms that stretch far above the head, creating a dramatic V-shape. The figure is dressed in a two-tone outfit, with a dark upper garment and lighter pants, and is depicted in a crouched or squatting posture. The legs are bent at sharp angles, and the feet are positioned apart, suggesting a dynamic or strained pose. The head is small relative to the body, with visible hair that appears to be medium-length and straight. The hands and feet are simplified, with minimal detail, and the overall form is stylized rather than anatomically accurate. The surface appears matte and smooth, with clear color separation between clothing and skin.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated arms raised overhead, wearing a two-tone outfit and crouching in a dynamic pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped, elongated arms, bent legs, and the face partially visible beneath the arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the pronounced bend in the legs, with the head and torso profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the separation of the legs, and the arms stretching upward and outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same exaggerated arm and leg proportions, with the head turned slightly and the feet visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve top and fitted pants
